title: Crossover Ideas
wikitext:
[]: Crossover Ideas Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Aug 03, 2009 2:34 pm What kinds of Eva crossovers would you wan't to see? Silly or Serious. Maybe a Godzilla crossover with him whupping some Angels. Or a Death Note crossover with Light taking out members of NERV with Gendo as his final target and them plotting against each other when Gendo learns about the Death Note wanting to use them to further his own goals. It would be, plotting, scheming, plotting, scheming, plotting.

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Aug 03, 2009 2:38 pm There's already one of these floating about. (too lazy to bring up link)

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Aug 03, 2009 2:39 pm Didn't know that. Lock if one is found.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 03, 2009 2:47 pm This one asks for serious suggestions, but so very few actually are: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6336

Or a Death Note crossover with Light taking out members of NERV with Gendo as his final target and them plotting against each other when Gendo learns about the Death Note wanting to use them to further his own goals. It would be, plotting, scheming, plotting, scheming, plotting.
